codeReview.summary: The current implementation and runtime-facing test already prove the canonical Success toast and persistence behavior, but this feature handoff points at commit 7835272, whose scoped diff does not contain the settings toast fix. The actual fix landed earlier in commit 266727a, so the feature does not satisfy the worker-skill requirement to identify the commit that directly contains the feature change.

issues.description: The handoff claims commit 7835272 implemented this settings toast regression fix, but that commit only changes backend tracking regressions and docs; it does not touch the settings/profile spec or settings UI. The real fix is in earlier commit 266727a, which replaced the nonexistent workspace-settings-toast test id assertion with the visible Success!/Your workspace has been updated text assertions. This feature therefore lacks a commit-local implementation matching its claimed scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-test-worker skill explicitly requires the handoff commitId to directly contain the feature code changes or to say that no scoped implementation was needed instead of pointing at an unrelated commit. This worker reported commit 7835272 even though the settings toast fix landed in 266727a.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill: .factory/skills/frontend-test-worker/SKILL.md step 10; handoff: /Users/opentoggl-ci/.factory/missions/e037dfea-351f-4685-b798-ddaaec9dfb1c/handoffs/2026-03-25T04-59-09-502Z__tracking-ui-settings-success-toast-regression-fix__a3cb088e-fadd-43dc-b23a-95405668ea5b.json; git show 7835272 --stat shows only backend/docs changes; git show 266727a -- apps/website/e2e/settings-and-profile.real-runtime.spec.ts contains the toast assertion fix.

summary: Fail: the underlying toast regression is already fixed and the current test remains strong, but this reviewed feature does not point to a commit that actually implements the fix, so the assigned feature handoff is not traceable to its claimed scoped change.
